inputs.label: Deck Length
inputs.businessContext: Total length of the deck area in meters.

inputs.label: Deck Width
inputs.businessContext: Total width of the deck area in meters.

inputs.label: Board Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of one deck board, typically available in standard sizes.

inputs.label: Board Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of one deck board (e.g., 140 mm = 0.14 m).

inputs.label: Board Price
inputs.businessContext: Unit price of one deck board in currency.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Additional material percentage to account for cuts and waste (e.g., 10% = 0.1).
